scope: Add IntegratedSimdMigrationRecord as first-class integrated scenario evidence
Tie clean vector-state rehome evidence to S9 cross-hart activation migration evidence
Require exact generations for activation migration, feature set, vector states, activation generations, harts, queues, and activation context
Reject missing, dirty, stale, or same-hart vector migration evidence
Emit IntegratedSimdMigrationRecorded event and stable osctl ViewV1 JSON
Expose historical graph edges without creating live ownership or adapter-internal semantic truth
Publish target_executor semantic package roots and count validation for X3 evidence

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: X3 SIMD task migration across harts
all integrated SIMD migration references carry kind/id/generation
integrated scenario uses Historical graph edges for vector and migration attribution
osctl exposes stable ViewV1 JSON and contract validation output

findings_fixed: osctl command and inspect dispatch expose integrated-simd-migration JSON
contract graph resolves X3 evidence through exact activation migration, target feature set, vector states, activation, hart, queue, and context generations
target_executor writes X3 roots/counts into the semantic package so root validation covers the new evidence
history graph emits Historical edges only for integrated SIMD migration attribution
semantic validation rejects dirty vector context, missing migration evidence, generation drift, stale context binding, and same-hart migration
bad_smells_checked: No raw vector register payload migration is claimed by the integrated record
No cross-hart substrate interrupt execution is claimed by the integrated record
No adapter or substrate internal state became semantic truth
No third-party dependency was introduced in semantic_core
osctl emits stable ViewV1 JSON rather than internal Rust structs
residual_notes: X4 owns network + disk concurrent IO
Future real SIMD runtime must replace semantic vector evidence sources without changing the X3 object identity contract

validation_commands.command: cargo check -p semantic_core -p artifact_manifest -p contract_core -p target_executor -p osctl

residual_gaps: X4 owns network and disk concurrent IO
Real SIMD vector payload migration must later provide substrate-backed vector state evidence
